holdings.infoBox: MSSM is an equity ETF with a total of 2238 individual holdings. The top holdings are Us Dollars stock at 2.39%, Sandisk at 1.83%, Bloom Energy at 1.17%, FTAI Aviation at 1.00%, and Veeco Instruments at 0.94%.

overview.description: The Morgan Stanley Pathway Small-Mid Cap Equity ETF (MSSM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of US mid- and small-cap equity securities. The fund utilizes a multi-manager strategy in constructing the portfolio. MSSM was launched on Nov 18, 1991 and is issued by Morgan Stanley.
